item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 2min This is the game-defining kickout I keep talking about. Highlighted the numbers to il
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 2min This is the game-defining kickout I keep talking about. Highlighted the numbers to illustrate the point. Armagh could so easily have stepped off it a man light. Pressed up, really organised, talking, everyone sure of their job against Tyrone’s bunch & break routine. Massive. 72

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 58min “It wasn’t sitting well with them, getting some of the criticism we were getting.”
item.description:
Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 58min “It wasn’t sitting well with them, getting some of the criticism we were getting.”
Tyrone boss Malachy O’Rourke speaks about the critics and their struggle to get hands on the ball in extra-time after the game yesterday 7 4 mil

item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h With several promising @Galway_GAA players emerging, Darren Morrissey is looking forward to th
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 1h With several promising @Galway_GAA players emerging, Darren Morrissey is looking forward to the @gaaleinster SHC gaa.ie Darren Morrissey excited about emerging Galway talent Click here to listen to the full interview with Galway senior hurling captain Darren Morrissey. By Cian O'Connell With a new wave of talent emerging, these are encouraging times for Galway. A... 1 4 mil

item.title: CahairOKane1: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 2h A column on Rory McIlroy, Armagh, how so much analysis is blinded by results and hindsi
item.description: Cahair O'Kane @CahairOKane1 · 2h A column on Rory McIlroy, Armagh, how so much analysis is blinded by results and hindsight and why decisions live or die on their execution, constructed just to tell the story of having breakfast with Jordan Spieth’s caddy De irishnews.com 2 4 1 mil
